reviews.review_title: Great fun for the full family
reviews.review_description: Great game for the kids... Only downside is that it's rather short. A content update would be greatly appreciated

reviews.review_title: Unnecessarily Difficult In th Wrong Ways
reviews.review_description:
The game starts off promising enough, but almost IMMEDIATELY after the tutorial stage is completed, the first few stages throw WAY too much around you to realistically keep up with. Cows spitting milk at you while cactuses throw minesveverywhere while you're trying to dodge and attack 5 different fu***ng crows charging at you all at once from every direction, all while you are getting locked into place just trying to attack! Don't even get me started on when they throw in the p.o.s. snakes spitting venom lines all over the arena that are impossible not to lose at LEAST 30% of your health on because thevdevs thought it would be cute and "fun" to throw 4-5+ all at once, even with other enemies in the midst of them!
Add to this the fact that you CAN NOT upgrade or do ANY go**amn thing with your Crumbling stats-wise, because you ned coins. Which you ONLY f****ng get 1 (yes... only 1) from actually completing a run....
No difficulty options either, so it's stuck on "F-You" mode with the only way to progress is "get gud", or in other words, "get lucky"...

Another useless part is the intermittent side game in the middle of a run. Like the don't touch the pole game that's IMPOSSIBLE in VR (or at least here), even if I can easily do it physically in real life. So it's a complete waste of time and nothing else.

That's a good description for the game itself honestly, "A complete waste of time". Because though it starts off promising and with plenty of charm, it devolves into being artificially difficult. Just infuriatingly hard for the very wrong reasons a game should be challenging you..

So I highly recommend anyone not get fooled into being interested as I was and to save your hard earned money on this one..

developer_response.body:
Hey Teele,
Yeah, Crumbling can be a bit of a challenge.
I'm super sure you'll get the hang of it and when you do, you'll find it's not that hard.

Here are a few tips that might make your life easier:
- Stay calm and keep your distance. Especially the cows will punish you for attacking from the front in a panic.
- Try hit & run attacks and don't commit to a full attack sequence. But if you do, know that you jump a bit on the start of each attack towards your controller. So you can still move a little.
- You can level up your collectible figurines using the magic you gather. So you absolutely can upgrade.
- Try and scale down the size of the game in the settings. Smaller world means more overview and easier movement.
- Stay friendly. People are more likely to help you if you are ;)

reviews.review_description:
I love this game and it’s concept 10/10. But it’s pretty short currently. I finished it the same day I bought it. Still glad I got it though. Are y’all planning to add more levels and crumblings? May I suggest a child’s play room or toy chest for a level?
edit 12/30/24:I think they have forgotten about the game because no new levels or crumblings:(

I’ve only finished the tutorial and first level, but I’m digging it so far. The graphics/environments are top notch, really well done. Very crisp.  I’ll update the review with more details after I put more time in.  It’s at least worth a go in my opinion. You can always return it if you don’t enjoy. You’ll know within the first 30 mins if it’s for you or not.

Update: 1/20/24
I’ve put in a few hours now and the more I play, the more I fall in love. It seems like it should be so simplistic but it’s not at all.  It gets real hectic trying to stay alive, and it’s a real challenge completing the later levels. The difficulty ramps up after the first 3-4 levels.  

Kinda wish there were more unique in game upgrades, but I’m not far into the game at all so there might be a ton more abilities i haven’t reached yet. So I’ll reserve judgement in this category until I play more. 

It’s actually a shame this game only has 10 reviews as of today. If nothing else, it’s a quality made game with zero bugs. Finally a game that’s ready on Day 1 release!  Hope this game takes off cuz I’d love to see endless updates to this game. 

Easily 5 STARS

Final Update (likely): 1/21/24
Ok, I’m in love with this game now. Now that I’ve gotten the 2nd action figure, I’ve got a whole new set of moves and weapons to play around with.  This game is brilliant. I do have 1 gripe though, and i reallllly hope it’s included in a future update: ENDLESS MODE. I’m not a fan of upgrading my action figure only for the game to end in 5-6 rounds.  I wanna see how far I can go without dying, and go against endless swarms of baddies. 
That 1 complaint aside, this game is a true gem.  No exaggeration, I can’t put this game down. Do yourself a favor and give it a go


For sure final update 12/21/24


The developer assured people this game was gonna receive regular updates. Never happened. Nothing, nada, zippo, for over a year now. Such a shame. It was a great game but needed much more content to make it worthwhile.  Highly disappointed. Don’t buy this thinking it will be updated one day. What you see is what you get

developer_response.body:
Hey PowPow,

What a rollercoaster of emotions, reading through your review! Ending on a bit of a downer, unfortunately. 

After 5 years of development, I am proud of my game and I stand by it.

I am sorry to hear you are 'highly disappointed'. I hope you can find the joy again you used to have with Crumbling.

reviews.review_description: on THE FIRST level there is a boss and it takes over 2 hours to even get to the second level and atleast i got it on discount for 12 dollars instead of 20, if you see this and you not a nerdy sweat dont get this game

I'm enjoying this game so much and currently only beat the first boss. If you have a spare 20, give this game a shot you'll probably like it

Edit 1: I have finished boss 2 and still love it. The shaman was a bit underwhelming he's not terrible at all, but his way of attacking just  made me feel like everyone could kill me just when charging up his attack, but I understand not wanting him to be op so I understand but I'm not changing my rating because of 1 character

Edit 2: I love gun man, the boss felt a bit too easy, but I will need to try on a harder difficulty, and for the juggernaut, you had me at hammer. I don't care for speed. I care for hammer. The only other thing I need is for him to move while attacking

reviews.review_title: Need improvement to be 5 stars for all
reviews.review_description:
Listen to me. this is MUST improvement. 
to be THE MOST SELLING game

this game has POTENTIAL.

1. locomotion on menu - just add teleport. please stick to market standard when it comes to locomotion. idea is good but it is just annoying. 
add teleport and abandon current locomotion. 

2. Realtime scale adjustment just like demeo and bam. - adjust scale only on menu is not clever. if want to keep this method just add “lock scale option” with realtime scale adjustment. 

3. add endless roguelike mode and this need to be main mode not the story mode. it is very important that how you have the people actually feel about play time. as long as story mode is main, people will think the contents and playtime is not enough for the price. BUT, if roguelike mode is MAIN, people will think the game has infinite playtime and many contents. and the game is well designed for roguelike. I think it is really easy to add. be clever. 

4. remove pulling trigger when select menu. this is joke. if you worry about mis-touch or something like that just adjust depth of touch with haptic feedback. 

5. add mixed reality mode. and this will make your game +2 times more popular. I swear. 
this is the game for MR. this will be one of the best MR supported game. because game design is just perfect for MR. trust me. 

if you improve these 5 things as soon as possible, crumbling will be one of the most popular game in META Store. 
I know it is not that easy but It is not that difficult too. 

just do what you MUST do ASAP before other good games come out. be clever and act quickly. 

and you will grab money. some times be quick is more important than quality as long as game is playable without BIG problem. small bugs are okay for a while. 

sorry for being rude but, I am sure that this will help you. 

Thanks

* I know there are arrows l, but it is not the best as long as player should approach to the arrows to move to another side. please delete unnascessary actions. it is okay if you really want to stick to that method. but you should turn off adjustment of play place which is turned on by default. grab button is very easy push by mistake. it is not cool at all. updated stars but before fix these, it is still not 5stars in my mind.

developer_response.body:
Hi, thank you for your review.
Have you noticed the black arrows on the front of all the stations in the shop menu? They are for teleport.
We are currently working on a MR mode and it's coming soon.
We are working as fast as we can :)
We will also try and improve on the locomotion system to make it work for everyone. Hope we can truly deserve your 5 stars soon.

I just made it through the mystic woods and I’m so excited to see what the developer has in store for future updates!

developer_response.body:
Thank you!
Coming up next: Mixed Reality!

I Love this game so much I’m making my own crumbling! It’s blue soon to have an orange buddy and it’s great over all great game and I hope they add new comics or missions in the future.

Dear, Cerbusius or Cerberus or wolfie or Connor
This is a great game with three levels. You can play over and over again as three different characters on three different  difficulties. But I wonder when they updated it.

Thanks for the review!
Updates are coming as fast as I can make them :)

reviews.review_description: I love the game it simulates a toy shop story and is amazingly fun

developer_response.body: It's real though! All of this is a true story, not a simulation

reviews.review_description: Crumbling made me feel like a kid again. From ripping open the new toy to whipping around the battlefield in full 3D control of my action figure kicking bad guy butt, this game is a joy to play. The rogue light elements allow for replayability via different builds. The graphics are very charming and the environments are well-crafted. I'm very happy with my purchase.

developer_response.body: And I'm very happy with my customers! They are very well-crafted, too

reviews.review_description: Game has potential and a good idea to be different , the one thing that got me to stop is the movement, fix that and I’m back In With 5 stars

developer_response.body:
Hey, thanks for your review!
Can you specify what trouble you are having with the movement? You can either use the grip buttons to drag the play space. You can also use the thumbstick to move and turn either stepwise or continuously.
Join our Discord if you want to discuss more
https://discord.gg/k3PPEQ54W6

reviews.review_description: good :D

reviews.review_title: Why is this game not more covered ?
reviews.review_description:
I couldn’t find much about this game but saw plenty of positive reviews and asked my VR community what they thought.

Overwhelming positive.

So I grabbed it.

Having a ton of fun with it:

1. It’s a rouge lite, no idea by the description.

You hold your character in your right hand and slash through levels.

You have a main attack, a special, and moving your character at a high speed does damage.

Each time you clear an area you get a choice of power ups ( think hades) 

Adding to your run.

2. Your home base is the magical toy shop where you can buy and display toy environments / add ons to get boosts in your dungeons. 

3. You use magic that you collect from defeating enemies to purchase upgrades, toy environment boons etc.

4. Enemy variety is good in the levels I’ve played.

Music is whimsical “ think Anastásiya music box* and narrator is straight Santa clause reading. 

Basically, if you like comics, toys, music box lullabies and rogue lites you’ll enjoy this. 

Plays well stationary, has a zoom scale feature and graphics look great playing on meta quest 3.

Art style is unique.

This is my first meta review and I have 61 games.

I’m leaving a review because this game stands out, should be getting more love and buys and is an excellent VR game especially for the price.

I’ve definitely spent more and been unhappier or felt it was too gimmicky.

For ppl who enjoyed looking around the environments of pixel ripped 1995 you’ll dig the toy shop.

Def pick it up if you like 3rd person rogue lites.

developer_response.body: Thank you for this fantastic review! 😍
